notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package contains only surface-level combat events (武庸 vs 凤仙太子/周雄信/野樵子, 方源 vs 龙公) and one public action by 沈伤. No private knowledge, secret motives/plans, future-known information, or directly supported knowledge gaps are present. All events are ordinary visible combat actions. No hidden fact candidate can be extracted without speculation.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

insufficient source-backed seed: The seed primarily describes individual-level combat actions (武庸 vs 天庭主力, 方源 vs 龙公, 北原援兵 vs 天庭主力) without establishing a named collective faction/group with a concrete stake in the seed facts. 武庸 is described as '玉清滴风小竹楼主人' (owner of a building), not as a faction leader. 北原援兵 is a temporary group, not a named faction. 天庭主力 is a category of individuals, not a named faction with internal pressure. No family, clan, or organization is named as having a stake in the seed facts. No collective actor with ongoing pressure axis (interest, threat, resource, reputation, geography, succession, inheritance) can be reliably extracted from this seed.
IF export filter quarantined 10 legacy old-schema branches.
